headline: AT&T Is Plowing $250 Billion Into Building Its Network. Why That’s a Worry for Investors.
summary: AT&T  expects to spend $250 billion building out its network over the next five years.  The guidance could spook the market, which is already grappling with jitters about Big Tech’s aggressive spending plans.  AT&T said on Tuesday that it would accelerate its deployment of ﬁber, 5G, and wireless across the U.S., as a collaboration with satellite manufacturer  AST SpaceMobile  extends its coverage into remote areas.
